meta.title: haru — Voice-first cross-language dating
meta.description: Your message arrives in their language, in your own voice. Hear before you swipe. Slow dating, on purpose.

mockup.name: Aiko, 27
mockup.intro: Which café are you headed to today?

crossLanguage.title: Break the language wall, keep the human trace.
crossLanguage.body: Translated messages are not robot TTS. They are synthesized in the sender's own ElevenLabs voice clone — tone, pacing, accent all survive.

mockup.mineText: Beautiful weather today — want to take a walk?
mockup.translatedText: 今日は天気がとても良いですね、散歩しませんか?
mockup.caption: Same waveform = same voice. Only the language changes.

slowDating.title: Slowness, by design.
slowDating.subtitle: The opposite of instant matching. haru gives you less information up front on purpose — so a first impression can actually take shape.

discover.label: Discover
discover.title: Hear first, look later
discover.body: Profile photos stay blurred while the voice intro plays. We reduce the pure-photo filter loop on purpose.

message.label: Messages
message.title: Listen before you read
message.body: Incoming messages arrive sealed like a letter. Playing the audio once is what unlocks the translated text — the voice is part of the meeting.

photo.label: Photo reveal
photo.title: Photos unlock with the chat
photo.body: After 5 message round-trips you see part of their photo. At 10, it's fully revealed. Connection is paced by conversation, not by a paywall.

cta.title: Start with haru
cta.disclaimer: Must be 18 or older to use haru.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy — haru
privacy.description: How haru collects, uses, retains, and shares your data with third parties.

terms.title: Terms of Service — haru
terms.description: Terms of use, member obligations, content moderation, and liability for haru.

accountDeletion.title: Account Deletion — haru
accountDeletion.description: How to delete your haru account and what data is removed, retained, or anonymized.

legal.localeNotice: Only the Korean source text is currently available. Translations will be provided after launch.

authCallback.title: Your email has been verified
authCallback.body: Head back to the haru app and sign in.
